evidence: "I am a science fiction fan. Not of the 'horror' sci fi, but of the science fiction that makes you think"
"You need to pay attention to the story line. You can't keep getting up to get a snack or take a phone call"
"I don't always want a show that makes me analyse every scene and character until my brain hurts"
"Sometimes it's nice to sit back and just enjoy the story, and this series does that for me"
"I found it fascinating. and I've learned quite a lot"
"I was very pleased to find it on the Amazon list so I could see it again"
"The actors were not 'stars', but just really good actors that brought the characters to life"
"Michael Fassbender is a favorite of mine"
"I am a John Hanna fan so this program suited me just fine"
"The writers, cast, direction, all fed the imagination"
"The art work and the way it's done is amazing and quite beautiful"
"It is bizarre and scary and funny and touching and just plain wonderful"
"I loved this series. I'm tired of the same 'ol, same 'ol. This one is different and kept my attention"

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly mystery, thriller, and science fiction, with a strong appreciation for quality storytelling and production. They value emotional resonance and sensory experiences in their viewing choices, often preferring engaging narratives that require attention without being overly complex.
